name: video-subtitle
description: Add, generate, translate, and burn subtitles into videos. Provides a complete pipeline: audio extraction (ffmpeg) -> speech-to-text (Whisper) -> AI translation -> subtitle burning (ffmpeg libass). Supports single and dual-language subtitle modes. / 给视频加字幕、生成字幕、翻译字幕、烧录字幕；支持单语和双语字幕。
